name: sandcastle-incus
description: Sandcastle Incus is the Incus-backed implementation of Sandcastle v1: a Go CLI (sandcastle/sc) plus Auth App that provisions multi-tenant, tenant-scoped Incus container machines for AI and development workflows, wires them onto a user-selected Tailscale network, serves private tenant DNS, and publishes HTTP routes through shared Caddy infrastructure. Note: this project has over 100 source files; consider scoping analysis to a subdirectory for faster results.
